ddls:
CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Device identifier associated with the consumer */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Business unit identifier associated with the consumer */,
  "phases" INTEGER /* Number of phases of operation */,
  "nphases" INTEGER /* Total number of phases */,
  "PA" INTEGER /* Power A */,
  "PB" INTEGER /* Power B */,
  "PC" INTEGER /* Power C */,
  "P_CC" INTEGER /* Power Connection Current (P_CC) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of connection (low voltage, medium voltage, high voltage) */,
  "consumer_name" TEXT /* Name of the consumer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the consumer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the consumer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the consumer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumers_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES devices ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumers_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES business_units ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy metric */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the consumer associated with these metrics */,
  "yearly_net_offtake" REAL /* Yearly net offtake of energy */,
  "connection_power" REAL /* Connection power in kW */,
  "ex_night" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is excess energy consumed at night */,
  "PV" INTEGER /* Indicates if PV is installed */,
  "PV_power" REAL /* Power generated by PV systems */,
  "PVinverterpower" REAL /* Power output of the PV inverter */,
  "renewable_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the renewable source associated with these metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_metrics_renewable_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewable_source_id") REFERENCES renewable_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_metrics_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "dev_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., solar inverter, battery storage) */,
  "dev_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "dev_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the device in kW */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "bus_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "bus_location" TEXT /* Location of the business unit */,
  "bus_address" TEXT /* Address of the business unit */,
  "bus_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the business unit */,
  "bus_email" TEXT /* Email of the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_categories" (
  "cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., low voltage, medium voltage) */,
  "cat_index" INTEGER /* Index for category ordering */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the consumer associated with the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "energy_used" REAL /* Amount of energy used on that date */,
  "peak_demand" REAL /* Peak demand of energy on that date */,
  "off_peak_demand" REAL /* Off-peak demand of energy on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_logs_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewable_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable source (e.g., solar, wind) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the renewable source in kW */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the renewable source was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the renewable source */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the renewable source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inverters" (
  "inverter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inverter */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with the inverter */,
  "inverter_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the inverter in kW */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the inverter was installed */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the inverter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inverter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inverters_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES devices ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installation_logs" (
  "install_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation log entry */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device being installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "installer_name" TEXT /* Name of the installer */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Cost of installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("install_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installation_logs_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES devices ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account holder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email associated with the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, consumer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., warning, error, notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
